rationale: Internal API cleanup removing undefined error param from topology open event; no spec rule about event argument count.
Upstream dependency (whatwg-url) breaks on Electron 14+; packaging/dependency issue, no spec involvement.
TypeScript return type for find operations omits _id field; TypeScript typing issue, not a spec behavior violation.
Cursor getMore bypasses server selection; spec requires selecting the known server to respect monitoring state transitions.
Driver raises parse error when tls=false and ssl=false even though both values are identical; connection string spec violation.
Issue split from DRIVERS-1991; updating estimatedDocumentCount spec tests for Atlas Data Lake, not fixing driver behavior.
authSource presence in connection string incorrectly replaces the database name with 'test'; connection string spec violation.
TypeScript Filter type does not include _id; type system improvement with no spec-defined behavior involved.
Authorization error caused by database name being replaced with 'test'; downstream symptom of NODE-3767, no spec rule independently cited.
BSON parser rejects valid UTF-8 server error messages; parser incorrectly flags valid server bytes as invalid UTF-8 strings.
Description quotes spec: 'Drivers MUST retry once after abortTransaction/commitTransaction fails with a retryable error'; driver ignores RetryableWriteError label.
3.x version of NODE-3711; spec requires retrying abort/commitTransaction on RetryableWriteError label, driver does not.
ReadPreference.fromOptions ignores hedge and maxStalenessSeconds when readPreference is a string; spec-defined options silently dropped.
ObjectId.isValid() returns true for 12-char strings with non-ASCII bytes that throw on ObjectId construction; BSON spec validation logic incorrect.
Lambda invocation delay due to heartbeat timeout and reconnect behavior; implementation/environment issue, no specific spec rule violated.
CI test failure because server v5.2 changed aggregate explain response format; test compatibility issue, not a driver spec violation.
TypeScript type improvement for replaceOne replacement model; no spec-defined behavior involved.
Documentation update replacing generator/co examples with async/await; no driver behavior or spec involvement.
Driver sends client metadata on retry handshakes; server rejects with 'may only be sent in first isMaster'. Python driver and shell work correctly.
Issue split from DRIVERS-1387, Improvement type; proactive spec-rollout for mongocryptd serverSelectionTimeoutMS, not a bug.
Description: 'The spec states that the default for authSource is $external'; driver requires explicit authSource for MONGODB-AWS instead of defaulting.
Issue split from DRIVERS-1738, Improvement; removing deprecated slaveOK option per spec rollout, driver was not wrong before.
TypeScript type regression for _id inference after 4.2.1; type system issue, no spec-defined behavior involved.
New TypeScript dot-notation type hinting for nested filter keys; language binding improvement, no spec area involved.
Race condition in libmongocrypt between mongocryptd spawn and connection; implementation timing bug, no spec rule violated.
Error message improvement for invalid Decimal128 constructor argument; UX issue, no spec behavior involved.
Internal refactor replacing ~~ with Math.floor in js-bson; code style change, no behavior change or spec involvement.
TypeScript compatibility error with @types/node 16.11.18 in GridFSBucketWriteStream; dependency/type system issue.
BSON serializer uses JS truthiness instead of null/undefined check before toBSON; no spec defines toBSON override protocol.
README and API docs link versioning fix; documentation update with no spec or driver behavior involved.
TypeScript dot-notation feature breaks recursive schema types; TypeScript limitation investigation, no spec involvement.
findOneAndUpdate TypeScript return type missing _id field; type system regression, no spec-defined behavior.
TypeScript interface with array not accepted as filter; type system regression from dot-notation feature, no spec behavior involved.
TypeScript errors in NestJS/Mongoose from GridFSBucketWriteStream signature; duplicate of NODE-3843, dependency compatibility issue.
Calling cursor.next() twice in parallel produces cryptic error; UX improvement for unsupported usage, no spec rule violated.
getMore sent with cursor id as double instead of Long; server rejects with 'Field getMore must be of type long'; wire protocol violation.
Driver throws 'No AuthProvider for DEFAULT defined' when authSource=admin is specified but no credentials; auth spec defines behavior without credentials.
Depends on DRIVERS-685, Improvement type; adding new authorizedDatabases parameter per spec update, not fixing existing wrong behavior.
ObjectId comparison refactored to use Buffer.equals for performance; internal optimization with no behavior change or spec involvement.
uri-options spec test runner is broken and always passes; fixing the runner so spec tests actually validate compliance.
TypeScript type mismatch (Buffer vs Binary) in clientEncryption.decrypt docs/types; type system inconsistency, no spec behavior.
ChangeStreamDocument TypeScript type for documentKey is wrong shape; spec defines documentKey as {_id: ...}, not InferIdType<TSchema>.
Refactoring legacy spec runner runOn filter to use mocha hooks for better serverless test control; test infrastructure change.
FindCursor.count() returns limit count rather than total matched; deprecated API behavior, no spec defines count() semantics.
raw option set on collection level not propagated to aggregate and other operations; driver option inheritance issue, no spec defines raw behavior.
ObjectId _bsontype property inconsistently reports 'ObjectID' vs 'ObjectId'; internal BSON API inconsistency, no spec defines _bsontype.
Load balancer option parsing spec tests failing; fixing driver to pass spec tests for loadBalanced=true/false URI option parsing.
Deprecated Collection.count() silently changed semantics to always use aggregation; deprecated API regression, no spec defines count() behavior.
Description: 'The specification allows passing CANONICALIZE_HOST_NAME as authMechanismProperties; this value is ignored by the driver.'
mongocrypt native module install fails on M1/arm64 due to missing header; build/packaging issue, no spec involvement.
